commands_run: bash scripts/agent-coord.sh claim form-native-elf-exec-floor "walk Android ELF executable floor: Form-native ELF64/aarch64 executable wrapper plus four-way shape proof and optional runner receipt"
failure_reason: Added a Form-native ELF64/aarch64 executable-shape floor. form-elf-exec emits an ET_EXEC image with one RX PT_LOAD segment and _start syscall bytes that write FORM ELF and exit 42, without clang as compiler, assembler, or linker. Focused executable proof returns 63 four-way; Hati target proof returns 16383 four-way; the metal-plane audit writes the executable and file(1) reports ELF 64-bit LSB executable, ARM aarch64, statically linked, no section header. This host has no qemu-aarch64 runner, so execution is explicitly recorded as skipped and remains the next physical receipt. Rebased full Form validation returns fourth arm: 158 band(s) four-way with 574 ok and 0 divergent.

commands: bash scripts/agent-coord.sh claim form-native-elf-exec-floor "walk Android ELF executable floor: Form-native ELF64/aarch64 executable wrapper plus four-way shape proof and optional runner receipt"
